pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 19, export_result.sh line 15. Nuxeo REST API documentation confirms /default-domain/workspaces/{workspace_name}/{doc_name} path structure.

Code analysis: export_result.sh line 73 checks for filenames containing 'Q3' and 'Status'. The actual PDF file is q3_status_report.pdf (verified as real 5-page PDF with Q3 2023 Project Status Report content). File is renamed to Q3_Status_Report.pdf during setup.

Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 116-121 copy the attachment file to this location. File is sourced from /workspace/data/q3_status_report.pdf. Direct file inspection confirms this is a real PDF (6.1 KB, PDF v1.4) with 5 pages containing actual Q3 2023 project status report content.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves attaching a real Q3_Status_Report.pdf file (5-page PDF with legitimate Q3 2023 project status report content) to an existing 'Project Proposal' document in a Nuxeo Platform content management system. The document path is /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Project-Proposal, which follows standard Nuxeo REST API path conventions for document hierarchies. The attachment file is located at /home/ga/nuxeo/data/Q3_Status_Report.pdf and will be stored in the document's files:files property (supplementary attachments) while preserving the main file:content property.
